modelUsage.rawResponsePreview:
{
  "units": [
    {
      "unitId": "unit-01",
      "microKnowledgePoints": [
        {
          "microId": "micro-unit-01-001",
          "title": "游戏化的定义与起源",
          "summary": "游戏化是在非游戏语境中使用游戏设计元素，由佩林于2002年提出，德特丁界定，韦巴赫强调以创造“乐趣”服务现实目标。",
          "role": "definition",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["definition_grasp"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-unit-01",
          "sourceSupport": "p-014段给出了游戏化的定义、提出者及核心目的。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-unit-01-002",
          "title": "游戏化的应用案例",
          "summary": "瑞典奥丁广场地铁站的钢琴楼梯将爬楼梯转化为趣味互动体验，展示游戏化的实际应用。",
          "role": "example_case",
          "assessmentValue": "low",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["scenario_transfer"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-unit-01",
          "sourceSupport": "p-014段末尾以钢琴楼梯案例说明游戏化的实际应用。"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "unitId": "unit-02",
      "microKnowledgePoints": [
        {
          "microId": "micro-unit-02-001",
          "title": "心流理论",
          "summary": "当能力与挑战平衡、目标清晰、反馈及时，用户进入高度专注愉悦的心流状态。",
          "role": "mechanism",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["mechanism_reasoning"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-unit-02",
          "sourceSupport": "p-016段中阐述了心流理论的三个条件及其带来的沉浸愉悦。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-unit-02-002",
          "title": "实用-享乐框架",
          "summary": "用户体验分为实用质量（效率、可控）和享乐质量（身份、审美、意义），享乐质量满足自主、胜任、归属等心理需求。",
          "role": "model_layer",
          "assessmentValue": "medium",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-unit-02",
          "sourceSupport": "p-016段后部介绍了实用-享乐框架及其与心理需求的关联。"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "unitId": "unit-03",
      "microKnowledgePoints": [
        {
          "microId": "micro-unit-03-001",
          "title": "DMC整体三层结构",
          "summary": "DMC模型分为动力、机制、组件三层，从体验目标到具体功能逐步落实。",
          "role": "model_layer",
          "assessmentValue": "high",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-unit-03",
          "sourceSupport": "p-020段描述了DMC金字塔分层结构。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-unit-03-002",
          "title": "动力层的作用",
          "summary": "动力层界定系统整体体验，包括约束、情感、叙事、成长关系等。",
          "role": "model_layer",
          "assessmentValue": "medium",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-unit-03",
          "sourceSupport": "p-020段解释了动力层回答“用户最终体验到什么”。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-unit-03-003",
          "title": "机制层的作用",
          "summary": "机制层组织用户行为与参与流程，如挑战、竞争、反馈、奖励等。",
          "role": "model_layer",
          "assessmentValue": "medium",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-unit-03",
          "sourceSupport": "p-020段说明了机制层将操作编排为可重复的参与。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-unit-03-004",
          "title": "组件层的作用",
          "summary": "组件层是用户直接感知的界面元素或功能模块，如成就、徽章、排行榜、点数等。",
          "role": "model_layer",
          "assessmentValue": "medium",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-unit-03",
          "sourceSupport": "p-020段指出组件层是用户最容易感知的操作单元。"
        },
        {
          "microId": "micro-unit-03-005",
          "title": "三层关系",
          "summary": "动力层提供方向，机制层形成操作循环，组件层落实为具体功能，层层递进。",
          "role": "relationship",
          "assessmentValue": "medium",
          "suggestedEvidenceAngles": ["structure_mapping"],
          "sourceAnchorId": "anchor-unit-03",
          "sourceSupport": "p-020段说明了三层之间的逐步落实关系。"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "unitId": "unit-04",
